name: Joe Negri
abstract: Joseph Harold Negri (June 10, 1926 – May 30, 2026) was an American jazz guitarist and educator. He appeared as himself and as "Handyman Negri" in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe segments on Mister Rogers' Neighborhood.

works.t: The Tale of Tsar Saltan: Flight of the Bumblebee

about_quotes.speaker: Sheryl Bailey
about_quotes.evidence: They would come through because of Joe Negri from Mr. Rogers Neighborhood. That was a Pittsburgh community. And through handyman Joe Negri all these great jazz artists and jazz guitarists would come through Pittsburgh.
about_quotes.doc_title: Sheryl Bailey interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 24, 2023
